flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lamar State College-Orange rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.3k → $17.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lamar State College-Orange rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lamar State College-Orange rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 (53.4% → 69.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lamar State College-Orange rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (15.3% → 17.5%).
